description_long: This is a modern diesel locomotive painted in a deep green livery with yellow accents at the front and rear. The body is streamlined, featuring a sloped nose and a series of ventilation grilles and exhausts on the roof. The sides display subtle branding and have minimal surface detailing, with a few access panels and technical markings. The undercarriage is equipped with visible wheels, suspension, and mechanical components typical of a high-speed passenger train. The windows are small and concentrated near the front, suggesting a driver’s cab, with no visible passenger windows along the sides. The overall design is robust and functional, optimized for pulling passenger carriages at high speeds.
description: A streamlined green diesel locomotive with yellow accents, featuring a sloped nose, roof grilles, and minimal side detailing. It has small front windows and visible undercarriage components.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sloped nose, yellow front panel, headlights, and small cab windows.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the elongated green body, subtle branding, roof grilles, and undercarriage details.
description_view_2: Rear view with a flat end, yellow rear panel, and visible mechanical components.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the green body, roof details, and undercarriage.
attribute_window_arrangement: small windows at the front only
